title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.topic: The end of a long day
tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, say why the people might have chosen to do these activities to relax at the end of a long day, and what they might be thinking about.

images.label: A
images.description: A person sitting in a comfortable armchair by a window, quietly reading a physical book as the sun sets.

images.label: B
images.description: A person in athletic wear jogging through a quiet street or park during the twilight hours to de-stress.

images.label: C
images.description: A person lying back on a sofa in a dimly lit living room, holding a remote and watching a movie on a large screen.

followUp.question: Who do you think is benefitting most from the activity they are doing? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, say why the people might be singing in these different situations, and how they might be feeling.

images.label: D
images.description: A lead singer of a band performing under bright stage lights, singing passionately into a microphone for a crowd.

images.label: E
images.description: A large group of people in a choir, dressed formally and singing together in a hall or cathedral.

images.label: F
images.description: A person singing alone in their car or kitchen, looking joyful and unselfconscious as they sing along to music.

followUp.question: Which performance do you think would be most enjoyable to listen to? (Why?)
